testcase.name: test_get_base_currency_with_auth
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iter18_currency_cleanup.py:30: in admin_token assert res.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"This code is reserved for platform administration. Please use the Platform Admin login portal."} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
